input: I ordered a blender 2 weeks ago and it arrived with a cracked lid. I want my money back.

output.summary: Customer received a blender with a cracked lid and wants a refund.
output.suggested_action: Verify order and initiate refund for damaged item.

input: Cancel my subscription before the next billing cycle please. No issues, just don't need it anymore.

output.summary: Customer wants to cancel their subscription before next billing cycle.
output.suggested_action: Process subscription cancellation and confirm no further charges.

input: There's a $49.99 charge on my card from your store but I never bought anything. This is fraud and I'm contacting my bank.

output.summary: Customer reports an unrecognized $49.99 charge and suspects fraud.
output.suggested_action: Immediately look up charge by card last-4 and investigate. Escalate to fraud team.

input: Hola, compré unas zapatillas talla 42 pero me llegaron talla 38. Necesito que me envíen las correctas.

output.summary: Customer received wrong shoe size (got 38, ordered 42) and wants the correct pair sent.
output.suggested_action: Arrange replacement shipment with correct size and provide return label for wrong item.
